parsing_res_list.block_content: We should always remember that we are teaching and learning English language for ourselves,not for the interest of the west nor for the MNCs of the superpowers.We would not allow those alien power to displace our native languages The English language should be in harmony with our regional languages, our traditional values,our socio-cultural set-up etc.公司添

So we should frame and design 公司添the syllabus and prepare the texts and contents Indian in concept,colour and spirit with a view to helping our learners to acquire the skills of English language and a the same time to develop in them a sense of belongingness to our socio-cultural identities -and high regard for Indian realities.

公司添公司
The teachers should create a congenial teaching-learning situation where the students are not compelled to learn English but they come forward by themselves to acquire the English language and appreciate English literature.

core_content.markdown:
## CONCLUSION 

## Use of audio-visual aids 

We should always remember that we are teaching and learning English language for ourselves,not for the interest of the west nor for the MNCs of the superpowers.We would not allow those alien power to displace our native languages The English language should be in harmony with our regional languages, our traditional values,our socio-cultural set-up etc.公司添



So we should frame and design 公司添the syllabus and prepare the texts and contents Indian in concept,colour and spirit with a view to helping our learners to acquire the skills of English language and a the same time to develop in them a sense of belongingness to our socio-cultural identities -and high regard for Indian realities.

公司添公司

The teachers should create a congenial teaching-learning situation where the students are not compelled to learn English but they come forward by themselves to acquire the English language and appreciate English literature.
